creator: silikonsystems@gmail.com
text:
I'm getting the same issue w/ a fresh metasploit install on FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p7

$ msfconsole
Bundler could not find compatible versions for gem "activerecord":
  In Gemfile:
    metasploit-framework-db was resolved to 4.11.0.pre.dev, which depends on
      metasploit_data_models (= 0.24.0) was resolved to 0.24.0, which depends on
        arel-helpers was resolved to 2.1.1, which depends on
          activerecord (= 4.0.13)

    metasploit-framework-db was resolved to 4.11.0.pre.dev, which depends on
      activerecord (< 4.0.0, >= 3.2.21)

    metasploit-framework-db was resolved to 4.11.0.pre.dev, which depends on
      metasploit_data_models (= 0.24.0) was resolved to 0.24.0, which depends on
        activerecord (< 4.0.0, >= 3.2.13)

Could not find gem 'activerecord (= 4.0.13)', which is required by gem 'metasploit-framework-db', in any of the sources.
